texto: I understand that you want to have fun. That you like to distract yourself from life by going and doing these ridiculous things and laughing the whole time while you do them. I know you want to pretend that everything’s okay by trying your best to act normal, but I don’t. I want to sit in this house and mope around and be sad and revel in the fact that my life is complete shit from here on out.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John Corey Waley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I understand that you want to have fun. That you like to distract yourself from life by going and…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, teen pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.
